# CWE-921 vulnerable: world-readable secret file
lang: go
file: CWE-921-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-921: Storage of Sensitive Data without Access Control.
// Vulnerable: API key written to /tmp with permissive mode 0644.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func StoreIntegrationKey() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		key := c.PostForm("api_key")
		path := "/tmp/integration.key"
		if err := os.WriteFile(path, []byte(key), 0644); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"stored": path})
	}
}
